title: [spec-compliance] Duplicate build_context and signature functions in edhoc.rs
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:446-507 has duplicate build_context_2, build_context_3, build_signature_structure with inconsistent CBOR (0x85/0x6a vs \x6bSignature1). Dead code, compile break, mismatches RFC 9528 §5.3.1 Signature1 and Python. Violates spec/06-security.md. See ses_07076286effeyM9Bu5Zr6pa6rl
